content.text: Ranged specialist. Plant your feet, control sightlines, make every shot count. Abilities are trained techniques — firing drills, breathing exercises, spatial awareness. No surgery, just thousands of hours of practice.
Steady Aim (Passive): When you don't move on your turn, your first ranged attack gets +1 accuracy. Stacks with Targeting Suite augment for +2 total while stationary.
T2 — Trained Techniques (300 cr each, 1 downtime)

rows: Designate a target within line of sight. All allies attacking that target this round get +1 accuracy. You're calling the shot for the squad.
Once per combat: gain +2 Evasion until the start of your next turn, but you cannot move until then. Dig in and take it.
Ignore the first -2 accuracy penalty from any source each turn (suppression, smoke, wound penalties). Training overrides panic.
First reload each encounter costs 0 AP. Muscle memory.
Choose an ally. Until the start of your next turn, the first enemy that attacks that ally provokes a free ranged attack from you (uses Reaction, full weapon stats). You're watching their back.
You can estimate exact distances. +1 accuracy on Overwatch attacks. You always know the range.

content.text: T3 — Advanced Techniques (600 cr each, 2 downtime)

rows: Your Suppress action (3 AP) now also applies -1 Evasion to all targets in the suppressed zone. You're not just pinning them — you're exposing them.
While stationary: you have 360° line of sight for Overwatch and Reactions. No one sneaks up on you.
Once per combat: immediately after hitting a target, make a second attack against the same target at -2 accuracy. The double-tap.
Designate a target. All allies that attack this target before your next turn: their first hit applies Cracked 1. The squad focuses fire on your call. Once per encounter.

Your next ranged attack this turn, if it hits, applies one condition (choose when used): Slow (half movement 2 rounds), Disarm (weapon dropped, 1 AP to pick up), or Daze (-2 to next check). Doesn't deal extra damage — it's surgical.
While in cover and stationary: cover bonus increases by +1 (Light Cover acts as Heavy, Heavy acts as +3). You know how to use every inch of protection.

content.text: T4 — Master Techniques (1,000 cr each, 3 downtime)

rows: Once per encounter: for the rest of this turn, all your ranged attacks ignore cover bonuses. You've calculated the angles. Nothing is safe.
Your Overwatch can trigger twice per setup instead of once. Two enemies enter your lane, two enemies get shot.
When you attack an enemy below 25% HP while stationary: attack automatically hits. Still roll for crit. Finishing shots don't miss.

While you haven't moved for 2+ consecutive turns: all ranged attacks get +1 damage per die and your Evasion increases by +1. The longer you hold position, the more dangerous and harder to dislodge you become. Resets if you move.
